tree.name: Alperen Sengun
tree.tradeDescription: Rockets traded a 2023 1st round draft pick (WAS own, conditional, did not convey) and a 2025 1st round draft pick (DET own, conditional, became Joan Beringer #17) to Thunder for Alperen Sengun (drafted #16 by OKC)
tree.note: Turkish center, skilled passer and scorer

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Russell Westbrook to Wizards for John Wall and this conditional 1st round pick (Dec 2, 2020). Pick was lottery protected and never conveyed.
assetsGivenUp.note: Lottery protected 2023, top-12 in 2024, top-10 in 2025, top-8 in 2026; sent to OKC in Sengun trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Russell Westbrook
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets sent Chris Paul, 2024 1st (top-4 protected, became Nikola Topic #12), 2026 1st (top-4 protected), and pick swap rights in 2021 (top-4 protected) and 2025 (top-20 protected) to Thunder for Westbrook
assetsGivenUp.note: 2017 MVP, traded from Thunder in blockbuster swap with Chris Paul

assetsGivenUp.name: Chris Paul
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets sent Patrick Beverley, Lou Williams, Sam Dekker, Montrezl Harrell, DeAndre Liggins, Darrun Hilliard, Kyle Wiltjer, $661K cash and a 2018 1st round pick (Omari Spellman #30) to Clippers for Chris Paul
assetsGivenUp.note: 9x All-Star point guard acquired from Clippers in blockbuster

assetsGivenUp.name: Patrick Beverley
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed from Spartak St. Petersburg (Russia) during 2012-13 season; tenacious defender

assetsGivenUp.name: Lou Williams
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Corey Brewer and a 2017 1st round pick (Tony Bradley #28) to Lakers for Lou Williams
assetsGivenUp.note: Three-time Sixth Man of the Year

assetsGivenUp.name: Corey Brewer
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Rockets sent Troy Daniels, cash and a 2015 2nd (Rakeem Christmas #36) to MIN; PHI sent Alexey Shved to HOU; HOU sent Sergei Lishouk and a 2015 2nd to PHI; MIN sent Ronny Turiaf to PHI
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran swingman from Timberwolves

assetsGivenUp.name: Troy Daniels
assetsGivenUp.note: Undrafted from VCU in 2013; signed to multi-year contract July 14, 2014

assetsGivenUp.name: 2015 2nd Round Pick (#36)
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally SAC's pick, acquired by HOU in Jason Terry trade (Sep 17, 2014); sent to MIN in Brewer 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Jason Terry
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA; traded to SAC for this pick

assetsGivenUp.name: 2017 1st Round Pick (#28)
assetsGivenUp.note: Rockets' own 1st round pick; sent to LAL who traded it to Utah

assetsGivenUp.name: Sam Dekker
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Rockets traded Ömer Aşık, Omri Casspi and cash to Pelicans, and a trade exception to Wizards; Pelicans traded Alonzo Gee, Scotty Hopson and a future 2015 1st round pick (#18, Sam Dekker) to Rockets; Pelicans traded Melvin Ely to Wizards; Wizards traded Trevor Ariza to Rockets
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #18 from Wisconsin with pick acquired from NOP

assetsGivenUp.name: Ömer Aşık
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA Jul 24, 2012; sent to NOP in 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Omri Casspi
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA Jul 16, 2013; sent to NOP in 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2015 2nd Round Pick (#32)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Marcus Camby to Knicks for Toney Douglas, Josh Harrellson, Jerome Jordan, a 2014 2nd round pick (Nick Johnson) and this 2015 2nd round pick (#32, Montrezl Harrell)
assetsGivenUp.note: Harrell became 2020 Sixth Man of the Year with LAC

assetsGivenUp.name: Marcus Camby
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Jonny Flynn, Hasheem Thabeet and a 2012 2nd round pick (#40, Will Barton) to Trail Blazers for Marcus Camby
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran center/PF; acquired from POR then flipped to NYK 4 months later

assetsGivenUp.name: Jonny Flynn
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Brad Miller, Nikola Mirotić (#23 draft rights), Chandler Parsons and a 2013 1st round pick (#21, Andre Roberson) to Timberwolves for Jonny Flynn, Donatas Motiejūnas and a 2012 2nd round pick (#40, Will Barton)
assetsGivenUp.note: Former #6 pick (2009); passed through HOU briefly before being shipped to POR for Camby

assetsGivenUp.name: Brad Miller
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA Jul 20, 2010; sent to MIN in Flynn trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2011 1st Round Pick (#23)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Aaron Brooks to Suns for Goran Dragić and this 2011 1st round pick (#23, Nikola Mirotić)
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick acquired from PHX in Brooks trade; draft rights sent to MIN in Flynn deal

assetsGivenUp.name: 2013 1st Round Pick (#21)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Shane Battier and Ish Smith to Grizzlies for DeMarre Carroll, Hasheem Thabeet and this 2013 1st round pick (#21, Andre Roberson)
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick acquired from MEM in Battier trade; sent to MIN in Flynn deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Shane Battier
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Stromile Swift and the #8 pick (Rudy Gay) to Grizzlies for Shane Battier
assetsGivenUp.note: Traded back to MEM in 2011 for Thabeet + pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Stromile Swift
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA Aug 2005

assetsGivenUp.name: 2006 1st Round Pick (#8)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU own pick; sent to MEM in Battier trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Hasheem Thabeet
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Shane Battier and Ish Smith to Grizzlies for DeMarre Carroll, Hasheem Thabeet and a 2013 1st round pick (#21, Andre Roberson)
assetsGivenUp.note: Former #2 pick (2009, MEM); biggest bust in modern draft history

assetsGivenUp.name: Shane Battier
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost — full chain tracked under 2013 1st Round Pick (#21) node

assetsGivenUp.name: Ish Smith
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA Aug 23, 2010; sent to MEM in Battier/Thabeet trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2012 2nd Round Pick (#40)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIN in the same Flynn trade; sent to POR in Camby trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2018 1st Round Pick (#30)
assetsGivenUp.note: Rockets' own pick; top-3 protected, conveyed as #30. LAC traded to ATL who drafted Spellman.

assetsGivenUp.name: DeAndre Liggins
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA; salary filler in Chris Paul trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Darrun Hilliard
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA; salary filler in Chris Paul trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Kyle Wiltjer
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA; salary filler in Chris Paul trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations ($661K)
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to LAC in Chris Paul trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 1st Round Pick (#12)
assetsGivenUp.note: Rockets' own pick, top-4 protected, conveyed as #12 to OKC

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Still owed to OKC (top-4 protected). If top 4, becomes $1M and 2026 2nd round pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 Pick Swap Right
assetsGivenUp.note: Top-4 protected; HOU had #2 pick (Jalen Green), so OKC could not exercise the swap

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 Pick Swap Right
assetsGivenUp.note: Top-20 protected; OKC did not exercise the swap

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#17)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Pick acquired from Pistons in Christian Wood trade (Nov 24, 2020). Did not convey 2021-2024, conveyed in 2025 as #17 overall.
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally conditional 1st from DET; conveyed in 2025 as #17 overall. OKC traded to NYK, then to MIN who selected Beringer.

assetsGivenUp.name: Christian Wood
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets sent Trevor Ariza, Isaiah Stewart, cash and a 2027 2nd round pick (HOU own) to Pistons for Christian Wood, a 2021 2nd round pick (LAL own, Luka Garza) and a conditional 1st round pick (became 2025 #17 Joan Beringer)
assetsGivenUp.note: Power forward; Ariza and Stewart were acquired from Portland in Robert Covington trade 2 days earlier and immediately flipped

assetsGivenUp.name: Trevor Ariza
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Robert Covington to Portland for Trevor Ariza, Isaiah Stewart and a 2021 1st (lottery protected, became Usman Garuba #23)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Portland in Robert Covington trade; immediately flipped to DET

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: MIN traded Covington to HOU; HOU traded Clint Capela and Nene to ATL; HOU traded Gerald Green and 2020 1st (Zeke Nnaji #22) to DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIN in 4-team trade; sent to POR for Ariza, Stewart, and 2021 1st

assetsGivenUp.name: Clint Capela
assetsGivenUp.note: 2014 #25 pick; sent to ATL in 4-team trade for Covington

assetsGivenUp.name: Gerald Green
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed as FA; sent to DEN in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#22)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU own pick; sent to DEN in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Nene
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed as FA; sent to ATL in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#16)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Robert Covington to Trail Blazers for Trevor Ariza, the draft rights to Isaiah Stewart (#16) and a 2021 1st round pick (lottery protected, Usman Garuba #23)
assetsGivenUp.note: Stewart drafted by POR Nov 18, traded to HOU Nov 22 in Covington trade, flipped to DET Nov 24

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost — full Covington chain tracked under Trevor Ariza node

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Rockets' own 2nd round pick sent to Detroit

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to Detroit
